headline: GE Keeps Climbing. Should You Climb On?
summary: This jet engine giant is in a clear uptrend, but after such a powerful run, investors must ask if the price of admission already accounts for the quality of the flight.

headline: RTX's Collins Aerospace opens UK Engineering Center of Excellence to advance next-generation aircraft systems
summary: Collins Aerospace, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, announced today its Engineering Center of Excellence in Wolverhampton, U.K. is fully operational, advancing next-generation electric thrust reverser actuation systems (elecTRAS™). The CoE is home to a new state-of-the-art, modular and scalable test facility designed to facilitate innovation in aircraft actuation system design, testing and certification.
